action_set_definitions.name: fetch_property_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current metadata, physical attributes, and market context for a specific property from the environment state.

property_id.description: The unique identifier of the property (e.g., 'PROP-9921').

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_financial_data
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the environment for financial records including rent rolls and operating expense histories required for cash flow modeling.

property_id.description: The unique identifier of the property.

data_type.description: The type of financial data to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: update_valuation_parameters
action_set_definitions.description: Configures the core Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) parameters including duration and rates.

discount_rate.description: The annual discount rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.09).

reversionary_cap_rate.description: The exit/terminal cap rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.065).

action_set_definitions.name: apply_market_leasing_assumptions
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the Market Leasing Assumptions (MLA) for turnover and renewal scenarios.

downtime_months.description: Expected months of vacancy between leases (e.g., 9).

action_set_definitions.name: configure_expense_recoveries
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the recovery logic for operating expenses, specifically the gross-up percentage.

gross_up_percentage.description: Percentage to gross up variable expenses for recovery calculations (e.g., 1.0 for 100%).

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_valuation_npv
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the valuation engine based on currently configured parameters and returns the final NPV.

state_description.property_id: Unique identifier for the property under assessment
state_description.physical_attributes: Core physical characteristics of the property (sqft, beds, baths, lot size)
state_description.property_condition: The current maintenance state of the property (e.g., New, Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor)
state_description.market_context: Macro and micro-economic factors affecting the neighborhood
state_description.comparative_analysis: A list of identified comparable properties currently stored in the model's memory
state_description.current_valuation_model: The current approach being used (e.g., Sales Comparison, Cost Approach, Income Approach)

comparative_analysis: AUDIT_NOTE: Asset record restricted during Q4 Valuation Cycle
